articles.title: 'I want to score 200 in T20 match' - Vaibhav Sooryavanshi sets aspirational goal to break Chris Gayle's 175* record
articles.description: Gayle made 175* off 66 balls against Pune Warriors in 2013 at the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium, which is still the record for the highest individual score in T20 cricket.
